TextView.android:text:
NOVA Voice Assistant v1.0

How to use:

• Tap the mic button and speak
• Say commands in English, Telugu, Kannada, or Hindi
• Enable Background Listening to use even when app is closed
• Add custom greetings (e.g. 'Hi Mama' → 'చెప్పు మామా')
• Add custom contacts by nickname for voice calling

Commands work 100% offline - no internet needed!

Built with Android SpeechRecognizer + TextToSpeech API
